mapper.select:
SELECT ts.seq AS timeSlotSeq, ts.name AS slotName, ts.days_of_week AS daysOfWeek, ts.start_time AS startTime, ts.end_time AS endTime, c.seq AS classSeq, c.name AS className, c.capacity AS capacity, m.seq AS memberSeq, m.name AS name, m.phone_number AS phoneNumber, CASE WHEN c.staff_seq IS NOT NULL AND c.staff_seq = m.seq THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS staff, CASE WHEN pr.seq IS NOT NULL AND (c.staff_seq IS NULL OR c.staff_seq != m.seq) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS postponed,
CASE WHEN (c.staff_seq IS NULL OR c.staff_seq != m.seq) AND mm.seq IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS noMembership, CASE WHEN pr.seq IS NOT NULL AND (c.staff_seq IS NULL OR c.staff_seq != m.seq) THEN '△' WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 'O' WHEN a.status = '결석' THEN 'X' ELSE '' END AS status, a.attendance_date AS attendanceDate FROM class_time_slots ts LEFT JOIN complex_classes c ON c.time_slot_seq = ts.seq AND c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c2.seq AS class_seq, c2.staff_seq AS member_seq, -1 AS sort_order FROM complex_classes c2 WHERE c2.staff_seq IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mcm.class_seq, mcm.member_seq, mcm.sort_order FROM complex_member_class_mapping mcm ) cm ON cm.class_seq = c.seq LEFT JOIN complex_members m ON m.seq = cm.member_seq
LEFT JOIN complex_member_memberships mm ON mm.member_seq = m.seq AND mm.status = '활성' AND (mm.expiry_date IS NULL OR mm.expiry_date >= #{today}) AND (mm.total_count IS NULL OR mm.used_count < mm.total_count) LEFT JOIN complex_postponement_requests pr ON pr.member_membership_seq = mm.seq AND pr.status = '승인' AND #{today} BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date
LEFT JOIN complex_member_attendance a ON a.seq = ( SELECT a2.seq FROM complex_member_attendance a2 WHERE a2.member_seq = m.seq AND a2.class_seq = c.seq AND a2.attendance_date >= #{sevenDaysAgo} AND a2.attendance_date <= #{today} ORDER BY a2.attendance_date DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ts.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} and ts.deleted=0 ORDER BY ts.seq, c.sort_order, staff DESC, cm.sort_order, m.name

SELECT c.seq AS classSeq, c.name AS className, c.capacity AS capacity, m.seq AS memberSeq, m.name AS name, m.phone_number AS phoneNumber, CASE WHEN c.staff_seq IS NOT NULL AND c.staff_seq = m.seq THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS staff, CASE WHEN pr.seq IS NOT NULL AND (c.staff_seq IS NULL OR c.staff_seq != m.seq) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS postponed, CASE WHEN (c.staff_seq IS NULL OR c.staff_seq != m.seq) AND mm.seq IS NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS noMembership, CASE WHEN pr.seq IS NOT NULL AND (c.staff_seq IS NULL OR c.staff_seq != m.seq) THEN '△' ELSE '' END AS status, md.level AS level, m.info AS info, mm.start_date AS joinDate, mm.expiry_date AS expiryDate, mm.total_count AS totalCount, mm.used_count AS usedCount, ms.name AS membershipName FROM complex_classes c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c2.seq AS class_seq, c2.staff_seq AS member_seq, -1 AS sort_order FROM complex_classes c2 WHERE c2.staff_seq IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT mcm.class_seq, mcm.member_seq, mcm.sort_order FROM complex_member_class_mapping mcm ) cm ON cm.class_seq = c.seq LEFT JOIN complex_members m ON m.seq = cm.member_seq LEFT JOIN complex_member_metadata md ON md.member_seq = m.seq
LEFT JOIN complex_member_memberships mm ON mm.member_seq = m.seq AND mm.status = '활성' LEFT JOIN complex_postponement_requests pr ON pr.member_membership_seq = mm.seq AND pr.status = '승인' AND #{today} BETWEEN pr.start_date AND pr.end_date LEFT JOIN memberships ms ON ms.seq = mm.membership_seq WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND c.time_slot_seq = #{slotSeq} AND c.deleted=0 ORDER BY c.sort_order, staff DESC, cm.sort_order, m.name

SELECT sub.classSeq, sub.memberSeq, sub.status FROM ( SELECT a.class_seq AS classSeq, a.member_seq AS memberSeq, CASE a.status WHEN '출석' THEN 'O' WHEN '연기' THEN '△' ELSE 'X' END AS status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY a.class_seq, a.member_seq ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC ) AS rn FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND c.time_slot_seq = #{slotSeq} ) sub WHERE sub.rn <= 14 ORDER BY sub.classSeq, sub.memberSeq, sub.rn

SELECT a.member_seq AS staffSeq, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = '출석' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS presentCount FROM complex_member_attendance a JOIN complex_classes c ON c.seq = a.class_seq AND c.staff_seq = a.member_seq WHERE c.branch_seq = #{branchSeq} AND a.attendance_date >= #{fromDate} GROUP BY a.member_seq
